_meta.model: Demo Co. R2R Filtration Membrane -- TEA (illustrative)
_meta.scope: Public demonstration model of a roll-to-roll coated filtration-membrane line. ALL values are synthetic/illustrative -- this is a sales/promotional mock-up, not a real company's data. It shows the structure of the techno-economic model + dashboard we build for clients: a transparent layered engine, config-driven UI, provenance tags, an audit-gate suite, and a production-scale reframe that tells a pilot -> commercial profitability story.
_meta.notes: Single source of truth for parameter metadata. Engine reads `value` only. The passworded edit-mode writes back value/min/max/step and appends a change_log entry per edit. category+tier drive UI grouping / clutter management. Demo data: every number is representative, none proprietary.

deliverable_basis._note: Param VALUES are already the demo OPENING scenario (pilot scale). No separate validation anchor is overlaid (a public demo has no client spreadsheet to reproduce); the regression gate freezes the engine's own headline as a synthetic anchor. Left as an empty overlay so the model.py entry point is identical in shape to a real engagement build.

pinned_default._note: UI: param keys that open pinned to the dashboard's 'Pinned levers' zone -- the big top-line movers a prospect reasons in. Users pin/unpin freely (session); edit-mode 'set as default' persists a new list here.

publish._note: Editor-mode Save target. enabled=false -> Save persists to config + sanity-checks but does NOT git push. For the public demo this stays false; edits are session/local only.

scale_stages._note: Reframe VIEW control (NOT an edit-mode param): a qualitative production-scale selector that dilutes the FIXED cost-per-m2 stack (labor + overhead + baseline power) to approximate commercial scale-up, holding the scale-invariant VARIABLE stack (coating materials, substrate, throughput energy, disposal) fixed. fixed-cost-per-m2 scales as capacity_x^(exponent-1); displayed annual volume scales as capacity_x. exponent ~0.5 sits near the classic six-tenths capital rule. Approximation by design; credits ONLY fixed dilution -- variable improvements at scale (cheaper materials, OEE maturity) are deliberately left as unmodeled upside.

minor_factors._note: UI: low-salience levers collected into one 'Minor factors' expander at the bottom rather than their themed group, to reduce clutter. They remain fully live in the engine.

hidden_factors._note: UI: levers with negligible headline impact -- removed from the dashboard entirely while remaining in config at their default value. None for this demo.

status_vocab.client-provided: Given by client; not independently grounded yet
status_vocab.estimate: Our estimate, grounded by stated logic / public benchmark
status_vocab.constant: Physical constant or fixed modeling convention
status_vocab.illustrative: Synthetic value chosen for this public demo; representative, not a real company's data

tier_vocab.high: Materially moves the headline; surface in UI by default

web_speed.label: Line speed
web_speed.source: Illustrative -- representative R2R coating line speeds
web_speed.notes: Web/line speed. With coating width it sets the area throughput rate (m2/h). A top demo lever: a faster line spreads fixed costs over more m2.

web_width.label: Coating width
web_width.notes: Coated web width. With line speed sets area throughput (area_rate = speed x width).

roll_length.label: Roll length
roll_length.notes: Roll definition used for per-roll material accounting; cancels out of per-m2 economics (a minor factor).

operating_hours_per_day.label: Operating hours/day
operating_hours_per_day.notes: Scheduled run hours per day. Continuous operation assumed at the demo opening point.

operating_days_per_year.label: Operating days/year
operating_days_per_year.source: Estimate -- nameplate calendar net of planned maintenance
operating_days_per_year.notes: Operating days/year; ~340 leaves room for planned maintenance/holiday downtime.

oee_availability.label: Uptime (availability)
oee_availability.notes: Fraction of scheduled hours the line actually runs. Pilot lines often 0.5-0.8; maturing to commercial lifts it. A headline demo lever.

oee_quality.label: First-pass yield (quality)
oee_quality.notes: Good (sellable) area / produced area. Scrap (1 - yield) consumed materials but is not sold, so it hits both cost and revenue.

oee_performance.label: Performance factor
oee_performance.source: Modeling convention -- speed/minor-stop loss held constant
oee_performance.notes: OEE performance component; held constant for the demo to keep the throughput story to two intuitive levers (uptime + yield).

coat_loading.label: Coating loading
coat_loading.notes: Dry functional coating laid down per m2. Single source of truth for coating mass: drives both coating material cost and the mass balance (perturbing it must move both -- the consistency gate checks this).

coat_material_price.label: Coating material price
coat_material_price.notes: Blended price of the coating formulation (active + binder + additives). With loading sets coating material $/m2. A top demo lever.

substrate_cost.label: Substrate cost
substrate_cost.source: Estimate -- support web purchased per m2
substrate_cost.notes: Support web / substrate cost per m2 (priced per area, as substrates are bought).

substrate_areal.label: Substrate areal mass
substrate_areal.notes: Substrate areal mass; used only to close the mass balance (in == product + waste). Not a cost lever (substrate is costed per m2).

fte_count.label: Headcount (FTEs)
fte_count.source: Illustrative -- line crew across all shifts
fte_count.notes: Full-time-equivalent headcount running the line across shifts. Fixed annual cost amortized over annual good m2 -- dilutes with scale. The 'every business has labor' lever.

wage.label: Loaded wage
wage.source: Estimate -- US manufacturing operator wage benchmark
wage.notes: Base hourly wage before benefits/burden (see labor overhead).

labor_overhead.label: Labor overhead (burden)
labor_overhead.notes: Benefits + payroll burden applied on top of base wage.

fte_hours_per_year.label: Paid hours per FTE-year
fte_hours_per_year.notes: Paid hours per FTE per year (standard).

electricity_price.label: Electricity price
electricity_price.notes: Industrial electricity rate; applies to both baseline and throughput energy.

energy_intensity.label: Process energy intensity
energy_intensity.notes: Throughput-linked process energy per m2 (drying/curing ovens). Scale-invariant per m2 (a variable cost).

fixed_power_kw.label: Baseline power
fixed_power_kw.notes: Baseline facility power independent of throughput (HVAC, controls). A fixed cost -> dilutes with scale.

overhead_annual.label: Fixed overhead (annual)
overhead_annual.notes: Lumped annual fixed overhead (rent, G&A, insurance). Amortized over annual good m2 -> dilutes with scale.

disposal_rate.label: Disposal cost
disposal_rate.notes: Disposal cost for scrap + trim solids (coating + substrate not sold).

selling_price.label: Selling price
selling_price.notes: Membrane selling price per m2. Set to land the demo story (near-breakeven at pilot). A headline demo lever.
